ddls:
CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of the facility */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the facility is located */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "shop_number" TEXT /* Shop number within the shopping centre */,
  "shopping_centre" TEXT /* Name of the shopping centre */,
  "street_address" TEXT /* Street address of the facility */,
  "locality" TEXT /* Locality of the facility */,
  "postcode" INTEGER /* Postal code of the facility */,
  "business_hours" TEXT /* Hours of business for the facility */,
  "wheelchair_access" INTEGER /* Indicates if the facility has wheelchair access */,
  "display_width" REAL /* Width of the display area for the facility */,
  "facility_type_2" TEXT /* Secondary type of the facility */,
  "x_coordinate" REAL /* X coordinate for the facility's location */,
  "y_coordinate" REAL /* Y coordinate for the facility's location */,
  "uuid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the facility */,
  "result" INTEGER /* Result code for the facility */,
  "audio_guide" TEXT /* Audio guide file for visually impaired users */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the facility */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the facility */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL for the facility's website */,
  "emergency_services" INTEGER /* Indicates if the facility provides emergency services */,
  "public_transport_access" INTEGER /* Indicates if the facility is accessible via public transport */,
  "parking_available" INTEGER /* Indicates if the facility has parking available */,
  "facilities_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the facility's services and amenities */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the facility's information */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the facility based on user feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facilities_locality FOREIGN KEY ("locality") REFERENCES localities ("locality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facilities_facility_type FOREIGN KEY ("facility_type") REFERENCES facility_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facilities_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facilities_shopping_centre FOREIGN KEY ("shopping_centre") REFERENCES shopping_centres ("centre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the facility type */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the facility type */,
  "additional_services" TEXT /* Description of additional services provided by this type of facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the state belongs to */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Name of the capital city of the state */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shopping_centres" (
  "centre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shopping centre */,
  "centre_name" TEXT /* Name of the shopping centre */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the shopping centre */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the shopping centre */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL for the shopping centre's website */,
  "public_transport_info" TEXT /* Information on public transport options to the shopping centre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("centre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "localities" (
  "locality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each locality */,
  "locality_name" TEXT /* Name of the locality */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the locality is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the locality */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the locality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("locality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_guides" (
  "audio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audio guide */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility the audio guide belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the audio guide */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the audio guide file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the audio guide */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the audio guide in minutes */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the audio guide content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_guides_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_accessibility" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accessibility feature */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility the feature belongs to */,
  "wheelchair_access" INTEGER /* Indicates if the facility has wheelchair access */,
  "display_width" REAL /* Width of the display area for the facility */,
  "hearing_impairment_access" INTEGER /* Indicates if the facility has accessibility options for hearing-impaired users */,
  "visual_impairment_access" INTEGER /* Indicates if the facility has accessibility options for visually-impaired users */,
  "accessibility_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the accessibility features */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_accessibility_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of operational hours */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility the hours belong to */,
  "business_hours" TEXT /* Hours of business for the facility */,
  "public_holiday_hours" TEXT /* Hours of operation on public holidays */,
  "appointment_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if an appointment is required to visit the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_operations_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility the result belongs to */,
  "result_code" INTEGER /* Result code for the facility */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the result */,
  "result_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the result */,
  "result_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the result was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_results_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_uuids" (
  "uuid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each UUID */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility the UUID belongs to */,
  "uuid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the facility */,
  "uuid_description" TEXT /* Description of the UUID's purpose or context */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("uuid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_uuids_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., citizen, health worker, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the facility */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the facility was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, appointment) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the facility */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the facility (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waiting_times" (
  "waiting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waiting time */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility the waiting time belongs to */,
  "waiting_time" INTEGER /* Current waiting time in minutes */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the waiting time was recorded */,
  "estimated_wait" INTEGER /* Estimated waiting time in minutes */,
  "actual_wait" INTEGER /* Actual waiting time in minutes (if recorded) */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service for which the waiting time is recorded (e.g., general consultation, specialist) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("waiting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waiting_times_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)
